generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical speed sensor providing vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical steering angle sensor providing steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits raw LiDAR point cloud data over Wi-Fi using UDP for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits vehicle speed data over Wi-Fi using UDP for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits steering angle data over Wi-Fi using UDP for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from physical sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data transmitted from speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data transmitted from steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks with noise filtered through clustering and tracking preprocessing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and converts units for ROS2 intra-component and UDP inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point cloud data into structured object tracks for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time data visualization and monitoring services for vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables offloading of ACC computations from resource-constrained ECUs to cloud hardware for safety-critical operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC system operations via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks with data saving and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight, SaveDataAction, GenerateReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation command generation) to cloud-based hardware"
    DTDFVocab:provides OffloadComputationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, and other state data"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on current vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from processed LiDAR data"
]

instance SaveDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save collected vehicle data for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate operational reports from collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OffloadComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offload ACC system computations to higher-capacity hardware"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin component handling resource-specific functions including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking for ACC system"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity providing data processing and services"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization subcomponent of user interface"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel subcomponent of user interface"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwin, ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), steering, motor, and servo actuation are processed by the ACC Controlling FE and transmitted via ROS2 network to the Actuation FE. The ISO 23247 Data Translation component handles serialization and message alignment for control signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization requires 100 ms accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations despite industry standards typically mandating stricter synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 RA-based architecture implemented using ROS2 packages where each FE is a ROS2 node, organized into three entities deployed on distinct hardware; Physical Twin Entity departs from standard by hosting general automotive functionality such as Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components takes place within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Physical Twin Entity is deployed on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User Entity) is hosted on separate hardware components as per Section IV.B. Data is stored on a device external to the vehicle as specified in Section III.A (R3), with edge computing for real-time processing and cloud storage for persistent data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which structures the Digital Twin into Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Part 4 (Information exchange) governs data protocols, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) implemented for interoperable data collection and device control."
]
